chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-1245, 1246 & 1510 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 20.01.2025 M/s.Ovais Ali Shah & Shams Mohiuddin, Advocates for the Petitioners. Mr.Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Mr.Nadir Ali, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. These Petitions were filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeals before the concerned forums. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of these petitions with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeals, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, these petitions are disposed of by directing the appellate authority to decide the pending Appeals expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioners, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeals. Petitions stand disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). Office is directed to place copy of this order in above listed petitions Judge Judge nasir`
